Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: containers by form [300194507], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: chopping boxes [300423119], containers for preparing food [300198758], culinary containers [300197577], containers by function or context [300197200], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Rigid, often rectangular containers usually with a lid or cover in which something nonliquid is kept or carried.
Recipientes rígidos, a menudo rectangulares, generalmente con una tapa o cubierta, en los cuales se guarda o transporta algún elemento sólido.
Verpakkingen, vaak rechthoekig, meestal met een klep of deksel, waarin iets niet-vloeibaars wordt bewaard of gedragen.
Feste, oft rechteckige Behälter, üblicherweise mit einem Deckel oder einer Abdeckung, in dem etwas Nichtflüssiges aufbewahrt oder transportiert wird.
Contenitori rigidi, spesso rettangolari e di solito con un coperchio o una copertura in cui è conservato o trasportato qualcosa di non liquido.
حاويات صلبة، مستطيلة غالبًا، لها غطاء أو غطاء يُحفظ فيه أو يُحمل فيه شيء غير سائل.
